title: Astellas’ consolidation efforts to impact 50 Universal Cells employees
snippet: Follow along as BioSpace tracks job cuts and restructuring initiatives.

title: Lilly’s Foundayo reaches 1,390 patients in first week, trailing Novo’s oral Wegovy launch
snippet: While Novo Nordisk’s Wegovy pill reached more than 3,000 patients in its first week on the market, analysts at RBC Capital Markets said a direct comparison of the two figures could be misleading given the shorter data collection time for Foundayo.

title: UPDATE: Kailera breaks biotech IPO record with $625M debut
snippet: Obesity-focused Kailera Therapeutics debuted on the Nasdaq Friday after raising a record $625 million, beating Moderna’s $600 million from 2018.

title: RFK Jr. defends Makary, claims pharma ‘owns’ Congress and media
snippet: The pharma industry “own Congress, they own the media,” Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. told lawmakers by way of explaining the bad press against FDA Commissioner Marty Makary following the second rejection of Replimune’s advanced melanoma drug.

title: Novo may have muscle advantage over Lilly in weight-loss race: preprint
snippet: More patients on Eli Lilly’s tirzepatide lost over 5% of their lean mass versus those on Novo Nordisk’s semaglutide, according to a study that has yet to be peer reviewed.

title: Replimune cries foul on regulatory flexibility. But many Americans want a stricter FDA
snippet: After Replimune’s advanced melanoma drug was rejected for a second time, CEO Sushil Patel slammed the FDA for failing to exercise regulatory flexibility, while other experts bemoaned the agency’s lack of consistency. With new safety guidelines for gene editing therapies, the FDA has taken a first step toward fixing bo...

title: Merck’s PD-1/VEGF data star in stacked lineup of AACR ‘26 data reveals
snippet: The Merck update, which will shed light on a $588 million bet to succeed Keytruda, is part of a roster of presentations that could shape the future of ADCs, protein degraders and KRAS-targeted therapies.

title: Metabolomics profiling of acute myelogenous leukemia patients to identify systemic differences associated with in vitro sensitivity to SYK inhibitors.

journalName: Metabolomics : Official journal of the Metabolomic Society

title: Double-CRISPR Knockout Simulation (DKOsim): A Monte-Carlo randomization system to model cell growth behavior and infer the optimal library design for growth-based double knockout screens.

title: Discovery of an Endonuclease G-inhibitory Ku80-peptide protecting against leukemogenic rearrangements at the MLL breakpoint cluster.
snippet: Endonuclease G (EndoG) is an evolutionarily conserved enzyme that cleaves the Mixed Lineage Leukemia breakpoint cluster region (MLLbcr) under sublethal chemotherapeutic treatment conditions, causing leukemogenic chromosomal rearrangements. While endogenous inhibitors (EndoGI) control EndoG in lower organisms, no such EndoGI has been identified in mammalian....

title: External validation of PREDICT Breast v3.1 for overall survival in international cohorts, including young and invasive lobular subgroups.
snippet: PREDICT Breast is an online tool that provides survival predictions for patients with early-stage breast cancer, for different treatments after surgery. External validation is essential to assess model performance across populations and healthcare settings. We aimed to externally validate PREDICT using clinical practice data from the Netherlands, Sweden, an...

title: Deciphering MFAP5+ Fibroblasts in Pancreatic Cancer Progression via Multi-Regional Single-Cell RNA Sequencing With Experimental Validation.

title: Gene delivery of immunomodulatory cytokines to the lung preserves respiratory function during inflammatory challenge.
snippet: Respiratory infections that result in severe and life-threatening immune-mediated respiratory decline are a major public health issue. Controlling local respiratory immune reactions without the use of systemic immunosuppressants remains an unmet clinical challenge. title: Spatial Mapping of the Precancer-to-Cancer Transition in Breast and Prostate.
snippet: Breast and prostate cancers are both hormone-driven adenocarcinomas that undergo analogous invasion programs. Using lightsheet microscopy on intact tumors, we identified transitional junctions between precancerous and invasive regions. We then developed a multimodal serial-section workflow integrating volumetric reconstruction with spatial transcriptomics.....

title: Identification of novel drug-specific PARP inhibitor resistance mechanisms in ovarian cancer-implications for clinical practice.
